description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon the introduction of unauthorized or malicious software to meet the entity's objectives.

subcriteria.name: antimalware_edr
subcriteria.reference_text: Antivirus or endpoint detection and response software deployed on all endpoints and servers. CrowdStrike, SentinelOne, Carbon Black, or similar EDR solution active with real-time scanning. Virus definitions updated automatically. Alerts sent to security team.

subcriteria.name: vulnerability_scanning
subcriteria.reference_text: Vulnerability scanning performed on code dependencies and infrastructure. Snyk, Dependabot, Trivy, or similar scanning integrated into CI/CD pipeline. Scan results showing open CVEs with severity ratings. Remediation SLAs defined: critical within 48 hours, high within 30 days.

subcriteria.name: software_restriction
subcriteria.reference_text: Software installation restricted to authorized administrators. Application whitelisting or endpoint management preventing unauthorized software. Change detection monitoring for unexpected file modifications on production systems.

subcriteria.name: change_control
subcriteria.reference_text: Software changes go through a defined change control process before reaching production. Code scanning tools integrated into the build pipeline blocking merges with critical vulnerabilities.

mismatch_signals.reason: Physical access controls don't address malicious software.
User access lifecycle is not malicious software prevention.
